description: A customer's credit card on file for their subscription has expired. They need to update it.

nodes.task_description: The system sends an automated email to the customer warning them their payment method is about to expire.

expected_outcome.value: The customer is proactively notified of the issue.

nodes.task_description: The customer logs into their account and navigates to the payment methods section for their subscription.

expected_outcome.value: The customer accesses the correct page to update their card.

nodes.task_description: The customer adds their new credit card information and sets it as the default for the subscription.

expected_outcome.value: The payment method is successfully updated, ensuring no interruption in their subscription service.
